scripts.release:pack: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @amac84/betterbrowse-core && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @amac84/betterbrowse
scripts.release:publish: npm run release:check && npm run build && npm publish --workspace @amac84/betterbrowse-core --access public && npm publish --workspace @amac84/betterbrowse --access public
